entries.source: "Is social media harmful?"
entries.value: "Is sosiale media skadelijk?"

entries.source: "Is space exploration worth it?"
entries.value: "Is ruimteverkenning die moeite waard?"

entries.source: "Should homework exist?"
entries.value: "Moet huiswerk bestaan?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Debate any topic on inspir for argument learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: 'n praktiese gids vir die gebruik van Debate any topic op inspir vir leer argumenteren, met prompts, studielusse en veiliger AI-gewoontes.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: 'n sterker studielus

entries.source: AI Debate Coach For Sharper Arguments is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: AI-debatafrigter vir skerper argumente is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik om te leer in plaas van passief antwoorde te versamel. Die modus is gebou rondom 'n spesifieke taak: kies 'n onderwerp en gaan die confrontatie aan in 'n regtig debat. Kies 'n kant, word uitgedaagd en leer beter argumente te maak.

entries.source: AI Debate Coach For Sharper Arguments: practical guide
entries.value: AI-debatafrigter vir skerper argumente: praktiese gids

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI-tutor

entries.source: Answer counterarguments.
entries.value: Beantwoord teenargumente.

entries.source: Argument
entries.value: Argument

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Vra om 'n klein eerste stap in plaas van 'n definitief antwoord.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Vra die AI om jy redenasie te kontroleer, nie net wat resultaat.

entries.source: Choose a side.
entries.value: Kies 'n kant.

entries.source: Debate any topic
entries.value: Debatteer enige onderwerp

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Sluit af deur die idee uit wat geheugen terug te skryf.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompts om te probeer

entries.source: Start the live mode at Debate any topic. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Explain My Answer. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Begin die lewendig modus by Debate any topic. Wil jy 'n verwante leervorm, probeer dan Explain My Answer. Vir 'n breer beeld van die platform lees jy wat 'n AI-leermaat vir almal sou moet doen.

entries.source: Strengthen weak claims.
entries.value: Versterk swak beweringen.

entries.source: Students, debaters, writers, and curious learners who want stronger reasoning.
entries.value: Studente, debatteerders, skrywers en nuuskierige leerders wat sterker redenasievermoë wil hê.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Vertel die modus wat jy probeert te leer of te maak.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Dat verschil zie jy in die flow. In plek van een enorme reaksie bewegen die beste sessies deur 'n lus: stel 'n doel, probeer iets, krijg terugvoer, herstel die swak plek en kies die volgende aksie.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Die focus is belangrik. 'n algemene chatbot kan byna alles beantwoorde, maar 'n leermodus geeft wat gesprek vorm. Die stuurt jy na wat soort dink, oefen, terugvoer of verkennen waardoor die idee bly hangen.

entries.source: The coach pushes one strong counterargument at a time and tracks the claims that matter.
entries.value: Die afrigter bied een sterk teenargument op 'n slag en volg die bewerings wat saak maak.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Hierdie is dieselfde gewoonte agter studeren met AI sonder jezelf te besluitdriegen: hou die leerder aktief. AI is wat nuttigst wanneer wat terugvoer geeft op jy dink.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Hierdie modus is vooral nuttig vir leerders wat wil:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Probeer die stap in jy eie woorde.

entries.source: Use Debate any topic when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gebruik Debate any topic wanneer jy 'n sessie wil wat vinnig begin maar homself toch aan jou aanpas. Die eerste doel is nie om indrukwekkend te kskakel. Die eerste doel is om die volgende stap haalbaar te laat voel.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Waar hierdie modus by help

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Waar jy hierna natoe kan

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Jy kan ook begin met 'n ruwe versie van jou regte probleem. 'n rommelige eerste prompt is prima. Die sessie kan wat vlak, die teikengroep, sperdatum en styl verduideliken zodra jy begint.
